title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.150 - Exceptions to license requirements
text:
305.150.  Exceptions to license requirements. — The provisions of sections 305.120 to 305.160 shall not apply to public aircraft owned by, or to pilots in the service of, the government of the United States, or the state of Missouri.
(RSMo 1939 § 15121) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13920
